text: We are what we think. All that we are arises with our thoughts. With our thoughts, we make the world.
Drop by drop is the water pot filled. Likewise, the wise one, gathering it little by little, fills themselves with good.
Hatred does not cease by hatred, but only by love. This is the eternal rule.
Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it.
Smile, breathe, and go slowly.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
Kindness in words creates confidence. Kindness in thinking creates profoundness. Kindness in giving creates love.
He who knows that enough is enough will always have enough.
The soul becomes dyed with the color of its thoughts.
Very little is needed to make a happy life; it is all within yourself, in your way of thinking.
We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
It is not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
The wound is the place where the Light enters you.
What you seek is seeking you.
Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
A grandfather told his grandson two wolves fight within us — one of anger, one of love. Which one wins? The one you feed.
The obstacle is the path.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Do your little bit of good where you are; it is those little bits of good put together that overwhelm the world.
If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
Happiness is not something ready made. It comes from your own actions.
Try to be a rainbow in someone's cloud.
When I was a boy and I would see scary things in the news, my mother would say, ‘Look for the helpers. You will always find people who are helping.’
Keep your face to the sunshine and you cannot see a shadow.
How wonderful it is that nobody need wait a single moment before starting to improve the world.
Calmness, gentleness, silence, self-restraint, and purity — these are the disciplines of the mind.
Tell me, what is it you plan to do with your one wild and precious life?
Three things in human life are important: the first is to be kind; the second is to be kind; and the third is to be kind.
